comment: Built-in seed for the mcp_server PG table (per ADR-0006 §2.1). Loaded once by `pnpm mcp:seed` and idempotent on re-run (id is the upsert key). User/team installs go through POST /api/mcp-server/install (Phase 2 §2.5; admin-only) and INSERT directly with origin='user' or 'team'. The crossref-mock package is intentionally NOT here — it's an in-memory test fixture used inside ai-runtime when no real server is reachable, not an installable MCP server (see ai-runtime/transports.ts crossrefMockTransport).
